text:
REPORTING_REQ_POST_IR Practice met the minimum reporting requirement (post-IR) Indicator for whether practice met the minimum reporting requirement after Informal Review process 17 Num 8 Equals 1 if practice met the minimum reporting requirement after Informal Review process
MET_MIN_REPORTING_REQ Practice met the minimum reporting requirement (pre-IR) Indicator for whether practice met the minimum reporting requirement before Informal Review process 18 Num 8 Equals 1 if practice met the minimum
